name: Skyla
description_short: Unable to verify company information. Website displays a bot-blocking error message without accessible company content or service details.
description_long: Skyla operates under the domain https://www.skyla-us.com/ and is currently categorized as a payday-alternative lender. However, the website is not accessible for verification purposes. The site displays a technical error message indicating bot detection and blocking, with an error code (0.77fd117.1775517245.66569584) and IP address reference. This prevents comprehensive research into the company's actual business model, loan terms, APR rates, eligibility requirements, or service offerings. Without direct access to company information, marketing materials, or service documentation, it is impossible to verify whether Skyla actually operates as a payday alternative, credit union PAL provider, CDFI lender, or employer advance program—the core services that would justify its current categorization. The blocking message suggests either ongoing site maintenance, security measures, or potential technical issues. Any existing data about Skyla's operations, founding history, regulation status, or customer reviews cannot be confirmed against current website content. The inability to access the website makes it impossible to conduct a proper due diligence review or provide factual consumer guidance.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks
NCUA insured — deposits protected up to $250,000

diagnosis: Cannot recommend or assess Skyla at this time. The company's website is inaccessible, preventing verification of services, terms, and legitimacy. Consumers should avoid until the website is restored and company information can be independently verified.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
